summary: Testing completed for Evolution PRO OS - Webinar Mensile page (/partner/webinar) in Ottimizzazione phase. All backend endpoints working, frontend UI displaying correctly with 4 sections. Fixed sidebar navigation to allow admins to access Ottimizzazione when partner is LIVE.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/partner-journey/webinar/genera generates webinar content with AI (fallback working)
✅ Backend: Webinar data persists to database after generation
✅ Frontend: OttimizzazionePage shows link to 'Webinar Mensile Evolution' with 'Gestisci' button
✅ Frontend: WebinarPage shows Header section with generated title and date
✅ Frontend: WebinarPage shows Struttura section with 6 webinar blocks (45 min total)
✅ Frontend: WebinarPage shows Promozione section with EMAIL and CONTENUTI SOCIAL
✅ Frontend: WebinarPage shows Replay Automatico section with email follow-up sequence
✅ Frontend: Navigation from Ottimizzazione to Webinar page works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: PartnerSidebar now allows admins to access Ottimizzazione when partner phase is LIVE
Fixed: Added LIVE and OTTIMIZZAZIONE phases to PHASE_INFO in PartnerDashboardSimplified
Webinar generation uses AI with fallback to static template when LLM fails
All 4 WebinarPage sections render correctly: Header, Struttura, Promozione, Replay
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/partner/PartnerSidebar.jsx - Fixed admin access to Ottimizzazione for LIVE partners
/app/frontend/src/components/partner/PartnerDashboardSimplified.jsx - Added LIVE and OTTIMIZZAZIONE phase info
/app/backend/tests/test_webinar.py - Created new test file for webinar endpoints
seed_data_creation: Updated partner Marco Ferretti (id: 1) phase to 'LIVE' for testing Ottimizzazione access
context_for_next_testing_agent: Webinar Mensile feature is fully functional. Navigation: Partner view -> Ottimizzazione -> Webinar Mensile Evolution -> Gestisci button -> WebinarPage. Partner must be in LIVE or OTTIMIZZAZIONE phase to access Ottimizzazione page. The webinar generation creates title, promotional emails (3), and social posts (4) using AI with fallback.

webinar_backend.GET_webinar: WORKING - Returns webinar and promozione data from partner_webinar collection
webinar_backend.POST_genera_webinar: WORKING - Generates webinar title and promotional content with AI or fallback
webinar_backend.persistence: WORKING - Webinar data saved to database

webinar_frontend.ottimizzazione_link: WORKING - Shows 'Webinar Mensile Evolution' card with 'Gestisci' button
webinar_frontend.header_section: WORKING - Shows generated title, date, duration (45 min), format (Zoom Webinar)
webinar_frontend.struttura_section: WORKING - Shows 6 webinar blocks with durations
webinar_frontend.promozione_section: WORKING - Shows EMAIL (3 emails) and CONTENUTI SOCIAL (4 posts)
webinar_frontend.replay_section: WORKING - Shows replay flow and email follow-up sequence

ottimizzazione_access.sidebar_navigation: WORKING - Ottimizzazione unlocked for LIVE partners
ottimizzazione_access.phase_display: WORKING - Shows 'Ottimizzazione' as current phase for LIVE partners
